textPreview.title: Text received from peer
guide.title: How to Use
guide.connectDesc: Share your ID (copy or QR Code). The other party enters it and presses Connect. You can also click on an online user directly.
guide.transferDesc: After connecting, drag files to the center area, or click "Browse Files". You can also Ctrl+V to paste images or text.
guide.privacyDesc: Files are transferred via WebRTC peer-to-peer, never touching a server. Signaling uses WebSocket, but content is encrypted end-to-end.
room.title: Create Connection
qr.title: Scan QR Code to Connect
qr.label: Scanning will open the connection page automatically
static.title: This environment cannot connect in real-time
static.desc:
You are viewing a static page without a WebSocket server. Two parties cannot discover each other.
Download the desktop app for LAN transfers, or use the Replit version.
loading.title: Connecting…
webBanner.download: Download the desktop app for full P2P transfer
panel.shortcut.paste: Ctrl+V to paste images or text
panel.shortcut.batch: Drag multiple files for batch transfer
panel.shortcut.ble: BLE scan for LAN device pairing
guideConnection.title: How to Connect?
guideConnection.step1desc: Install and launch re/file on both devices
guideConnection.step2desc: Make sure both devices are on the same router or Wi-Fi
guideConnection.step3desc: Devices on the LAN will appear in the sidebar automatically
guideConnection.step4desc: Drag files or click "Browse Files" after selecting a device
guideConnection.step5desc: Click the QR icon to share connection info — scan to connect
guideConnection.extra: Transfers use TLS encryption + SHA256 verification. No intermediate server on LAN.
privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.saveHistoryDesc: Keep a log of all transfers
privacy.notificationsDesc: Show system notification when transfer completes
privacy.acceptAllDesc: Insecure — anyone can send files to you without consent
privacy.autoAcceptTrustedDesc: Automatically accept transfers from previously trusted peers
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help us improve the product (not yet implemented)
privacy.note: All settings are stored locally. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
folderCard.disconnectedHint: Select a device from the sidebar to start transferring files
incomingTransfer.title: Incoming File Transfer
sendText.title: Send Text
sendText.placeholder: Enter URLs, passwords, or any text…
incomingConnect.title: Incoming Connection
incomingConnect.from: {{name}} wants to establish a P2P connection with you
connectionTimeout: Connection timed out — no response from peer
connectionTimeoutLong: Connection timed out — make sure the other party is online and the ID is correct. If both sides are behind a firewall, try the web version or adjust network settings.
peerNotFound: No device found with this ID
landing.title: P2P Encrypted Transfer
landing.desc: Direct connection, no relay server, no cache retained

ble.autoScanList: BLE scanning — discovered devices will appear automatically
share.title: re/file Connection

app.deviceNotFound: No device found with this ID
app.footerLegal: Files are transferred with end-to-end encryption and never stored on any server
